    Recruitment

    We are always looking for talented and highly motivated students and postdoctoral researchers to join our team.
    If you are interested, please contact me by email with your CV.

    ⭐ Ph.D. and Master’s Positions for Students @ Qiuzhen College, Tsinghua

    Students at Qiuzhen College, Tsinghua University, at both the undergraduate and graduate levels, are warmly welcome to get in touch. If you are passionate about AI and interested in research, I would be happy to meet and discuss potential opportunities. Please feel free to email me to arrange a face-to-face conversation.

    🧑‍🔬 Postdoctoral Positions through the Tsinghua-BIMSA Joint Program

    We welcome postdoctoral researchers to join us through the joint postdoctoral program between the Yau Mathematical Sciences Center (YMSC) at Tsinghua University and BIMSA.

    Requirements: Ph.D. degree, or near completion, in Computer Science, Applied Mathematics, or related fields, with a strong research background. Applicants should have a good command of English and strong Python programming skills.

    Benefits: We offer a competitive salary package and comprehensive benefits, including dining, housing, insurance, and travel support. Postdoctoral researchers will have opportunities to work on cutting-edge interdisciplinary projects, engage in industry collaborations, and collaborate closely with researchers at BIMSA, YMSC, and the Department of Electronic Engineering at Tsinghua University. Outstanding candidates may also explore future opportunities for subsequent appointments at BIMSA.

    🎓 PhD Positions @ RUC–BIMSA Joint Program

    We welcome highly motivated Ph.D. candidates to join our group through a joint supervision program with Renmin University of China (RUC), in collaboration with the School of Mathematics and the Institute of Statistics and Big Data at RUC. Applicants must hold a Master’s degree at the time of admission.

    Degree Program: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.), 4-year program. The Ph.D. degree will be conferred by RUC, while research supervision and daily academic activities will be primarily based at BIMSA.

    Available Majors:

    • School of Mathematics: Pure Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, Probability and Mathematical Statistics
    • Institute of Statistics and Big Data: Statistics

    Admissions and Process: Admission is typically around May each year; please refer to the previous official notice. Early contact is strongly encouraged. Prospective students are welcome to engage in short-term research with our group before applying, so that both sides can better assess fit and alignment.
